disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Epigastric pain boring straight through to the back
trigger_question_examples: Where exactly is the pain, and does it go anywhere else?
Does the pain spread through to your back?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's right in the middle of my stomach and goes straight through to my back.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pain relieved by leaning forward, worse lying flat
trigger_question_examples: Does any position make the pain better or worse?
Is it worse lying down or sitting up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Leaning forward helps a bit, but lying flat on my back makes it so much worse.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: More than 10 episodes of vomiting, unable to keep any fluids down
trigger_question_examples: How many times have you vomited, and can you keep any fluids down?
Have you been able to drink anything and keep it down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've thrown up more than 10 times since yesterday and I can't keep any water down at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Feeling weak, lightheaded, and generally unwell, with a subjective fever overnight
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel weak, dizzy, or feverish at all?
How are you feeling in yourself generally?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel really weak and a bit lightheaded, and I think I had a fever overnight.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recent heavy weekend of alcohol consumption before symptom onset
trigger_question_examples: Have you been drinking alcohol recently, more than usual?
Was there any particular trigger before this started, like a big weekend?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, I had a pretty heavy weekend of drinking right before this all started.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I'd rather not dwell on the drinking, can we focus on the pain?

patient_initiated_exchanges.patient_text: Can I just try sipping some water or a rehydration drink to keep something down?
patient_initiated_exchanges.expected_ai_doctor_response_quality: Should advise strict nil by mouth given the suspected pancreatitis and ongoing vomiting, and should not suggest oral fluid challenge at home; should direct urgent same-day ED assessment for IV fluids instead.

deflection_behaviours.description: When asked about alcohol use, patient may briefly deflect before answering.
deflection_behaviours.deflection_text_template: I'd rather not dwell on the drinking, can we focus on the pain?
